label: Transparent foxglove spire motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Foxglove transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated foxglove spire motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single complete foxglove spire (Digitalis purpurea) with accurate woodland-edge botanical form: tall green stem, alternating lanceolate leaves, cascading rose-purple tubular bell flowers, cream throats visible inside several bells, fine burgundy speckles, crisp petal edges, natural veins, and careful clinical botanical detail.
Composition/framing: centered complete vertical spire cutout with generous padding on all sides; show the full stem, flower bells, several leaves, and the tapered top without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light, even exposure, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection; preserve rose purple, speckled cream throats, and woodland green.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ffff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform cyan color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ffff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no vase, no hand, no insects, no extra flowers, no landscape, no labels, no watermark, no text, no medical warning icons, no decorative border.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Foxglove light-mode design-system board, 4K source board
Primary request: Generate a single comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Foxglove" in a true wide 16:9 layout, intended as a high-resolution gallery source asset. Make the composition crisp and legible at 3840x2160.
Reference use: Use the foxglove spire motif as the visual source: rose-purple bell flowers, cream throats, burgundy speckles, woodland green stems/leaves, vertical spire rhythm, careful clinical botanical precision.
Canvas and resolution: 16:9 landscape, 3840x2160 style, large readable section headings, fewer larger token rows, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Foxglove title, Foxglove Spire motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, asset examples.
UI components to depict: button set, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, sidebar, top nav, command palette, search, data table, charts, metrics, clinical form panel, empty/loading/error/success states, token swatches, radius scale, spacing scale, shadow ladder, speckled texture samples.
Design language: shadcn/tweakcn-compatible clinical product system, exact grid, 8px radii, white and throat-cream surfaces, rose-purple primary actions, burgundy-speckle focus rings and selected states, woodland-green secondary controls, petal-surface cards, stem-muted borders, restrained shadows, vertical spire section markers.
Typography labels: Geist Sans, Source Serif Display accent, Noto Sans JP, Japanese Typography, Clinical Forms, Data Table, Command Search, Status, Tokens.
Palette labels: Clinical Cream, Woodland Ink, Foxglove Rose, Leaf Green, Speckle Burgundy, Throat Cream, Petal Surface, Stem Muted, Night Stalk.
Constraints: no generic purple/blue gradient, no unrelated saturated colors, no neon, no tiny unreadable labels, no stock logos, no poisonous-warning icons, no watermark, spell "Morphous Foxglove" correctly.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Foxglove dark-mode design-system board, 4K source board
Primary request: Generate a single comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Foxglove" in a true wide 16:9 layout, intended as a high-resolution gallery source asset. Make the composition crisp and legible at 3840x2160.
Reference use: Use the foxglove motif and the light board style already shown. Preserve the same component layout and translate it into dark mode: rose-purple bells, cream speckled throats, burgundy spots, woodland green leaves, vertical spire markers, careful clinical system mood.
Canvas and resolution: 16:9 landscape, 3840x2160 style, large readable section headings, fewer larger token rows, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Foxglove title, Dark Mode, Foxglove Spire motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, asset examples.
UI components to depict: button set, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, sidebar, top nav, command palette, search, data table, charts, metrics, clinical form panel, empty/loading/error/success states, token swatches, radius scale, spacing scale, shadow ladder, speckled texture samples.
Dark design language: shadcn/tweakcn-compatible clinical workspace, exact grid, 8px radii, deep woodland ink background, night-stalk panels, throat-cream foreground, rose-purple primary controls, burgundy-speckle focus rings, leaf-green secondary controls, stem-muted borders, restrained shadow and glow, subtle petal speckle textures, vertical spire navigation rail.
Typography labels: Geist Sans, Source Serif Display accent, Noto Sans JP, Japanese Typography, Clinical Forms, Data Table, Command Search, Status, Tokens.
Palette labels: Night Stalk, Woodland Ink, Throat Cream, Foxglove Rose, Leaf Green, Speckle Burgundy, Petal Surface, Stem Muted, Clinical Cream.
Constraints: no neon palette, no pure black empty void, no generic purple/blue gradient, no unrelated saturated colors, no tiny unreadable labels, no stock logos, no poisonous-warning icons, no watermark, spell "Morphous Foxglove" correctly.
